timeout.title: Request timed out – slow connection?
timeout.detail: The request took too long. Check your connection or try again.

apiDown.title: Cannot connect to API
apiDown.detail: API at {baseURL} is unreachable. Start the backend: python -m app.run

idle.title: Your session will expire in {countdown}. You will be logged out automatically.
idle.detail: Click the button below to continue your session.

expired.title: Your session has expired.
expired.detail: You will be redirected to the login page in {countdown}.

login.title: Dashboard Login
login.sessionExpired: You were logged out because your session expired. Please sign in again.
